summary: Added Stage 3G tech-resume insights graph project adapter detection, bounded read-only markdown table parsing, confidence label validation, project seeding integration, and repo hygiene repair that moves worker-result JSON evidence out of insights/ into worker-results/.

tests_run.command: uv run --no-sync python -B -m pytest tests/test_projects.py -q -p no:cacheprovider
tests_run.summary: 44 passed; covered generic registry behavior, planning SQLite adapter behavior, structured markdown adapter behavior, harness/config adapter behavior, insights graph adapter selection, confidence validation, read-only target behavior, project-seed-tasks apply behavior, malformed and oversized insights findings, markerless generic fallback, and target no-mutation checks.
Planning integrity checks passed with Stage 3G claimed for implementation and worker-result artifact paths migrated to worker-results/.
Story Loop status reported Stage 3G as the current running task before completion was recorded.
419 passed plus Ruff, format, mypy, CLI smoke checks, file justification, public hygiene, planning integrity, skill inventory, source inventory, protected locks, and uv lock --check.

Adapter selection identifies tech-resume.evidence: InsightsGraphAdapter is selected before GenericRepoAdapter when insights/graph.md contains the tech-resume marker; markerless insights graphs with generic authority markers continue to fall back to generic_repo.

The adapter reads target insights graph/.evidence: The adapter reads bounded insights/graph.md and wiki markdown files, caps graph bytes plus table rows and wiki files, validates confidence labels against the insight contract vocabulary, reports malformed or oversized inputs through adapter_findings, and tests assert target files remain unchanged.

Actionable insight rows or records becom.evidence: Actionable next-action rows map to insights-graph-* ProjectTaskCandidate records with graph row source paths, confidence-bearing source authority, contract fields, stable source IDs, and insight verification commands.

project-list and project-seed-tasks JSON.evidence: Existing project-list serialization exposes the new adapter facts, and focused tests apply insights graph candidates into a separate supervisor planning DB while preserving target graph text.

Focused tests cover valid insights graph.evidence: tests/test_projects.py now contains forty-four focused tests covering Stage 3G behavior plus existing Stage 3A-F project registry behavior.

Planning SQLite and HANDOFF.md record th.evidence: plans/planning.sqlite3 records the Stage 3G task shape and running worker, and HANDOFF.md records the shaped Stage 3G contract and current execution notes.

Worker-result evidence is routed outside.evidence: Tracked worker-result JSON files were moved to worker-results/, planning artifact links and worker run result paths were rewritten to worker-results/, WorktreeRunLayout now emits durable results under worker-results/, and file justification tests reject non-markdown files under insights/.

review.summary: Fresh-thread-style local review found no actionable findings after focused repair and full verification. Adapter ordering, bounded read-only graph parsing, confidence validation, generic fallback, worker-results evidence routing, markdown-only insights enforcement, and planning-link migration were checked.

risks: The insights graph adapter intentionally recognizes one fixture-backed tech-resume markdown table shape; broader schema variants may need follow-up support when real fixture evidence is available.
Later ROADMAP stages still need explicit task shaping before implementation because the current planning queue is empty after Stage 3 completion.
Live Codex Exec launch remains unavailable in this Windows shell because the resolved WindowsApps codex.exe path returns Access is denied.
follow_up_tasks: Expand the insights graph adapter if real tech-resume schema evidence differs from the fixture shape.
Consider adding a planning helper for future artifact-path migrations instead of one-off bounded SQLite repair scripts.
handoff_notes: Stage 3G adds the final named project adapter slice and relocates structured worker-result evidence out of insights/. Stage 3 is complete in planning SQLite; next work should shape the next missing ROADMAP slice through typed planning helpers before implementation.
